name: Secure Apple Calendar
description: Wraps apple-pim's calendar MCP tool with mcp-hooks ingress (InjectionGuard + SecretRedactor) and egress (SendApproval / LeakGuard) security.

applePimMcpCommand.description: Command to spawn the apple-pim MCP server (typically 'node').

applePimMcpArgs.description: Args to spawn the apple-pim MCP server (e.g. ['/abs/path/to/apple-pim/mcp-server/dist/server.js']).

applePimMcpCwd.description: Working directory for the apple-pim MCP subprocess (optional).

applePimMcpEnv.description: Extra env vars passed to the apple-pim MCP subprocess (e.g. APPLE_PIM_PROFILE).

trustedAttendeeDomains.description: Email domains whose attendees auto-pass SendApproval (e.g. ['example.com']). Matching is case-insensitive.

model.description: Copilot model used by hook LLM checks.

auditLogPath.description: Override path for the JSONL audit log (default: ~/.openclaw/logs/secure-apple-calendar-audit.jsonl).
